user_system_path: npm run controller:autopilot must generate a contract that can close its own source-truth finding instead of re-emitting the same seam.
forbidden_files_raw: `app/**`, `lib/**`, `supabase/migrations/**`, `app/api/stripe/**`, paid generation paths, outbound email paths, Stripe, schema migrations, destructive DB actions
required_local_proof: node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run scripts/__tests__/controller-autopilot.test.ts scripts/__tests__/preflight-contract.test.ts --reporter=verbose; npm run controller:autopilot; npm run health; npm run build
required_product_proof: Clean-tree controller rerun must not emit GENERATED-CANDIDATE-SELECTION-CONVERGENCE again after CURRENT_STATE closure.
acceptance_condition: Generated contracts include closure metadata and allow the exact source-truth file needed to retire the triggering finding, preflight rejects contracts that cannot close themselves, SESSION_HISTORY stays append-only, and a clean-tree controller rerun does not reselect the already-fixed convergence seam.
stop_condition: Stop if the closure metadata is missing, the source-truth file is not allowed, SESSION_HISTORY requires a rewrite, the clean-tree controller rerun still emits GENERATED-CANDIDATE-SELECTION-CONVERGENCE, or any required proof fails.
anti_regression_checks: Generated contracts from CURRENT_STATE.md include CURRENT_STATE.md in allowed files
Preflight rejects a generated contract whose source_truth_file is not allowed
SESSION_HISTORY.md remains append-only except for new receipts
Clean-tree controller rerun does not emit GENERATED-CANDIDATE-SELECTION-CONVERGENCE again after closure
next_command: Implement the controller closure rule, update CURRENT_STATE.md to retire the proven convergence finding without erasing broader truth, rerun the controller from a clean tree, then update ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and SESSION_HISTORY.md with the receipt.
